title: 信息日报 2026-07-05

headline.title: 科学家实现量子时间回溯突破，或重塑计算与能源未来
headline.summary: 研究人员利用量子控制技术使系统表现时间倒流，通过精确管理量子测量可重塑时间箭头并从测量过程获取能量。该突破有望推动量子计算机、量子电池等先进技术发展。
headline.title_en: Scientists make quantum time flow backward in stunning physics breakthrough
headline.summary_en: Researchers have created quantum control techniques that make a system appear to run backward in time, reshaping time's arrow and harvesting energy from measurement. The breakthrough could lead to more powerful quantum computers, quantum batteries, and other advanced technologies.
headline.original_title: Scientists make quantum time flow backward in stunning physics breakthrough
headline.reason: 该发现代表了基础物理学的重大突破，具有广泛的潜在应用，评分在所有候选新闻中最高（10.8），且具备极高的新闻价值和吸引力。
headline.reason_en: This discovery represents a major breakthrough in fundamental physics with broad potential applications, holds the highest score (10.8) among all candidate stories, and offers exceptional news value and appeal.
